title: LLM Configuration
description: Configuration for LLM providers in CoworkAny Sidecar

anthropic.description: Anthropic Claude API settings (base URL is fixed)

openrouter.description: OpenRouter API settings (base URL is fixed)

openai.description: OpenAI-compatible settings used by OpenAI and built-in compatible providers such as Aiberm, NVIDIA NIM, SiliconFlow, Gemini, Qwen, MiniMax, and Kimi

apiKey.description: API key for the selected OpenAI-compatible provider

baseUrl.description: Full chat completions endpoint URL for the selected provider

model.description: Model ID for the selected OpenAI-compatible provider

allowInsecureTls.description: Disable TLS certificate verification for this provider (unsafe, use only in trusted internal environments).

baseUrl.description: Full Ollama chat completions endpoint URL

custom.description: Custom third-party provider (base URL is configurable)

apiKey.description: API key for the custom provider

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the custom provider's API endpoint

model.description: Model ID for the custom provider

allowInsecureTls.description: Disable TLS certificate verification for this provider (unsafe, use only in trusted internal environments).

maxHistoryMessages.description: Maximum number of conversation history messages to keep

search.description: Web search provider settings for the search_web tool

provider.description: Active search provider. Serper.dev recommended (2500 free/month, Google results)

serperApiKey.description: Serper.dev API key (2500 free searches/month, no credit card needed). Get at https://serper.dev

searxngUrl.description: Custom SearXNG instance URL (optional, uses public instances by default)

tavilyApiKey.description: Tavily API key for web search (1000 free/month). Get at https://tavily.com

braveApiKey.description: Brave Search API key. Get at https://brave.com/search/api/

proxy.description: Outbound HTTP(S) proxy settings for sidecar model requests

enabled.description: Enable explicit proxy settings. When false, sidecar clears proxy env values from settings.

bypass.description: Comma-separated NO_PROXY hosts/domains that should bypass the proxy

browserUse.description: Browser-use AI automation service settings for smart browser mode

enabled.description: Enable browser-use service integration. When false, only precise (Playwright) mode is available.

autoStart.description: Automatically start local browser-use-service when smart mode needs it and the endpoint is unavailable.

serviceUrl.description: URL of the browser-use FastAPI service

defaultMode.description: Default browser automation mode. 'precise' = Playwright CSS selectors, 'smart' = AI vision, 'auto' = try precise then smart

llmModel.description: LLM model used by browser-use agent for visual understanding
